rationale: Replaces the placeholder content in .github/copilot-instructions.md with repository-specific guidance (development guide link, non-technical communication expectations, architecture constraints limiting languages to HTML/CSS/Javascript/Python, prohibition on CLI tools and long single-file apps) and adds a new .github/workflows/copilot-setup-steps.yml workflow with the required job name 'copilot-setup-steps'. The workflow starts a mongo:7 service exposing port 27017, sets up Python 3.13 with pip caching, and installs from src/requirements.txt — matching the body's promised bootstrap steps. The PR was closed without merge but the diff content matches its stated goal of preparing Copilot cloud-agent context, so it is clean.
